$comment: CS-FIXTURES — synthetic system.json FRAGMENT exercising the competitor_scan block (release-spec roadmap #5). NOT a full system.json (it omits the always-required reviewers/budget/publish/approval_surface/scheduler) — it is the competitor_scan + retention slice a test merges over a base system config or sub-validates against the competitor_scan sub-schema. competitor_scan.enabled=true turns ON the pathway; adapter='fixture' + voice_calibration.enabled=true wire the ZERO-KEY test path (helpers/fake-scraper-adapter.js + helpers/fake-analyst-seat.js) — NO creds, NO network (RD-9/RD-12). retention governs purge-corpora for the transient scan reports. ALL SYNTHETIC. NEVER real brand names.
